titleStmt.title: SII 15.135: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 135. (B.K. No. 43 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of Vīrabhadra temple.
This is dated Śaka 1100, Viḷambi, Phālguṇa-puṇṇami, Friday, eclipse, Saṁkrānti. This corresponds to 1179 A.D., February 23, when a lunar eclipse occurred. The Saṁkrānti was Mīna.

It records gift of income from sales made by the One Hundred representatives of Māḷeyagēri headed by Rudradēva, Kēśavayya and others, to the gods Abhinavaprasanna-Kēśavadēva and Śaṁkaradēva at Lokkiguṇḍi. The earlier portion gives the genealogical account of the Kalachuris and praises Aichiseṭṭi who was responsible for the installation of the deity of Kēśavadēva at Lokkiguṇḍi which was a renowned agrahāra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya negarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
nama(ḥ) stasya varāhāya līlayā caratē bhuvi khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇā yatēṁ .
śrī gindīvarānandacaṁdrō bṛndārakastuta�prasannakēśavaṟpāyād pāyā brajaṁ . prasa
nnakēśavasyōvyātprasannōvinamannṛṇāṁ Āditya vaṇijāṁ guṇi gaṇapatayē
śrī tākhiḷalōkanabhinavaprasannakēśava vibhu māḷkaiciseṭṭi gabhimataphaḷama . baḷa sogayipudiḷā
ḷakanatkaṭisūtramenel jaganidhi maṇigaṇanidhi ni¨rmmaḷa kōmaḷanidhi gaṁbhīratānidhi satataṁ . tadvāridhi parivṛta jaṁbūdvīpada madhyadalli nijakāṁ
caṁca nda sakaḷaviyadvaḷayābhōgamuṁṭu mērugirīṁdraṁ tadvāmya diśeyoḷamaḷinanadyavanīdharasarōjanavanapurakēdārōdyāna nikaraśōbhā
kuṁntaḷamahītaḷaṁ sogayisuguṁ . va . Ā kuntaḷadharācakramaṁ vikramadinākramisida bhuja baḷacakri bijjaladēvananvayāvatāramentane . dvijasute kanyā
diṁ bhujaṁgabhūṣaṇananō¨rvvaḷārādhise tattrivagatpati meccikaraṁ nijasvaropama nāgaḷa tōṟi baḷikkaṁ . varamaṁ bēḍene ninnoḷnerevude varameṁdoḍākeya sva
ranoṁde puṭṭidaṁ taddharāṁśamene kṛṣṇaneṁba tanayaṁ sanayaṁ . va . Āntu puṭṭi sakaḷa vidyagaḷoḍane . ka . naramāṁsāśananenisidanara
karaṇadoḷmaraṇamanā harasutaneydisi kāḷaṁjaradoḷtadrājyabharama niḷkuḷigoṇḍu . va . Antu navalakṣadahaḷāmahīvaḷeyamaṁ sādhyaṁmāḍi
śvara cihname tanage rājacihnamāge rājyaṁgeydanātananvaya prabhavā bhūpōttamānvayadoḷu . ka . nijavīravitaraṇade bhūbhujarūḷsale kannamaṁ
brajanadhipatiyādaṁ varavijayaśrīgaṁ vinūtakī¨rttiśrīgaṁ sajjana sēvya¨rppuṭṭi darujjīvitasakaḷarājyavidya¨rttanaya¨rbbijjalarājalanaṁba
yaṁgaṁ puṭṭuvavōl . kṣitipogaḷe rājalakṣmāpatigammugi śaṁkava¨rmma nu kriṣṇaṁ sannuta yōgarājanaṁba¨rssutarāda¨rnnālvaruṁ parākramā gaḷ . jō
sūnu mahābhāgaṁ nijakī¨rttipūritāśābhōgaṁ prāgavanīpati caritōdyōgaṁ pe¨rmmāḍi bhūbhujaṁ pesa¨rvettaṁ . va . tattanūjaṁ . ka . pusiyalu vīrabhōjyā vasuṁdha
rā yeṁba vākyemena dhareyaṁ sādhisidaṁ teṁkabdhiya baḍagasīme viṁdhyādriyanisi bijjala dēvaṁ . va . Ā bhujabhaḷa cakrava¨rttiputra . ka . rāyamurāri bhuja
vitaraṇa vivēkanidhi gaḷachuriyāmnāyavihāyōvaḷayātrēyaṁ śrīsōvi dēva cakrādhīśaṁ . tadanujanamaḷinaguṇagaṇasadanaṁ satyōktinika
bhāsvadvadanaṁviḷāsavi¨rjjitamadana sale śaṁkava¨rmmadēvaṁ negaḷdaṁ . śaraṇāgata paviva¨rmmaṁ paripāḷita sakaḷadha¨rmmanutpāditabandhura pari
kaḷachuri tiḷakaṁ śaṁkava¨rmma cakrādhīśaṁ . va . Ā niśśaṁkamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta rōttara prava¨rddhamāna mācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁba
re tatnāladoḷu . ka . viḷasatkuntaḷadhātrilalanege tāṁ kuntaḷapradēśamenalbeḷvo ladēśamesavudadaṟoḷu tta lokkiguṇḍigrāma . Adu
ḷa kaṇi vēdadāgaraṁ sakaḷadha¨rmmadha¨rmmaśrīgāspadavakhiḷasajjanāśrayōdātta tānidhi samastavastu Ā grāmada sāsi¨rvvaru
maṁ pēḷvaḍe ni grateyiṁ dvijarūpamanugrā . kṣiti pogaḷe lokkiguṇḍiyoḷatipriya hiriyasēnabōvaṁ bhāsva
t puṇyōdaya kēśavanata¨rkkyaguṇanamaḷataraya ḍedaṁ . va . Āntu nirantara sthitisāramuṁ vastusāramuṁ prabhusāramuṁ
ragrāma cakrava¨rtti lokkiguṇḍiyoḷu . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya dhyāna dhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭāna japasamādhi śīla
guṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta¨rviditavēdā¨rtthavidyāpāraga¨rsvadha¨rmmaniyata sapta sōmasaṁsthāvabhri tāvagāhanapavitrīkritaśarīra catu
śāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷitadhai¨ryya¨rddhai¨ryaparākramarāśritajanakaḷpavrikṣarahita pakṣakṣayakara¨rkkaliyaṁga
parōpakārigaḷāhavadhuraṁdhara¨rśśāpānugrahasama¨rttha¨rkā¨ryya bṛhaspatigaḷēkayka paṁḍitagrāmanāmōttama¨rvaiṣṇavagītimanōhara pu
paranārīdūra¨rdduṣṭavidhvaṁsaka¨rvviśiṣṭajanāśraya¨rkāmakrōdhalōbhamōhaviva¨rjjita ¨rdvātriṁśatsahasra samayā¨rgghya¨rdvijakuḷatiḷaka¨rśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁja
guṇaviśēśōnnatarappa śrīrāmadatti mahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṇḍiyoroḍeya pramukhavaśēśamahājanaṁgaḷuṁ śrī sāsi¨rvvaruṁ
hiriya sēnabōvaṁ puṇyōdaya kēśavadēvayyaṁgaḷu dha¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadha ¨rmmadiṁpratipāḷisuttamire . © varaguṇa keyiṁ caritra
parahitadiṁ paradharōḷitaṁ jagadoḷparadanenalpuradaraiciseṭṭiye negaḷdaṁ . va . Ātana jagatprasiddhaviśuddhānvayōdayamentene . ka . bhuvana
ya vaiśyavaṁśadoḷpe¨rmmevetta nāgarakuladoḷ vyavahāri janāgraṇiyudbhavisi samantaiciseṭṭi jasamantaḷedaṁ . Ātanasati jakkavvevinūte guṇā
hitārundhati vikhyāte nijabandhusamudaya nūtanakaḷpalateyenisi pettaḷpeṁpaṁ . dhareyoḷtatputraṁ bandhuragātraṁ sakaḷa puṇyapātraṁ lōkō
traṁ sale saṁkaraseṭṭi jasakke tāne tāymaneyādaṁ . dhātriyoḷātana sati sāvitri patibrate samagratā nūtana sāvitri mahīmahimācaḷa pa
le jasamanasadaḷaṁ pasarisidaḷ . tatsutanabhijanavatsaḷanutsāritadu¨rgguṇavimatsara natuḷōdyatsaṁpadanāśritabharaṇōtsukamananaicisa
nuḍiyoḷtodaḷācāradoḷ ḍaṁbatākṛtiyoḷekkasakka jasadoḷtoḍareni lāvaṁgaḍa mānyaṁ moraṭadaiciseṭṭivōlanya
nunnati tannoḷvāridhiya gabhīravṛtti surakujada mahōdāraṁ nelasidavene vistārisidaṁ jasamanaiciseṭṭiyenisidaṁ . Aicana guṇamu
ye taṇguralu basantada siriyu lōbhamumogetaṁdamṛta marīciyanuṇbaḷavā rāmaṁ mōhisave . Ātaṁganujātaṁ raghuja
sahōdaraneṁbantātatayaśanu¨rvvīnutacātu¨ryya kanniseṭṭi ni¨rmmaḷa caritaṁ . kannaṁge śuddhavaṁśōtpannaṁge parā¨rtthakaraṇapariṇataguṇa saṁ
ḷitapratipannaṁge samānamoḷare mahīmaṇḍaḷadoḷ . piriyananujātariṁdeṁbara mātaṁ ti¨rkke sakaḷaguṇa piriyanenuttaṁ pogaḷva¨rppiriya
daiciseṭṭiye dhanyaṁ . ratiyaṁ pā¨rvvatiyanaruṁdhatiyaṁ bhāratiyaninitananukari paḷtatsati sōmavve viśiṣṭākṛtiyuṁnati bha¨rttṛbhakti
. va . Antu sakaḷagōtramitrakaḷatrasamētavaiciseṭṭiya¨rssukhadini¨rddoṁdu divasaṁ dha¨rmmapurāṇaśravaṇadoḷ śrīkēśavapratiṣṭāpuṇya
tyamumaṁtadananakaraṇasāma¨rtthyamumaṁkēḷdu nijaviśuddhabuddhiyappudariṁ tatkṟiyōdyuktanāgi sakaḷadha¨rmmakṣētramappa śrīmadgrā
va¨rtti lokkiguṇḍiyoḷ . ka . māḷeyagiri śrīlīḷeyinānti¨rdda ratna māḷeyacelvaṁ pāḷisidudallivanadikpāḷeyamaṁ taraḷamaṇiyana
vēṁ . va . Endu bagedandu . ka . pāṣāṇaruciraka¨rmmaviśēṣavabhinavaprasanna kēśava bhavanaṁ dōṣāpahaveṁdeṁduvaśēṣajanaṁ negaḷe pogaḷvinaṁ
. vri . divijahaṭatti(tki)rīṭa maṇirōcivirājita pādapaṁkajaṁ bhuvanajanastutaṁ nikhiḷadānavabhodharavadriniṁdirādhavananaghaṁ sarōjanibhalōcananutsa
prasannakēśavanolaviṁda rakṣisuge savinayāṁbudhiyaiciseṭṭiya paramā¨rtthavriśavantana parikisalu śrī-śēkarātmōdbhavaṁ pi�duṁ dāni
ka¨rṇnaniṁde hiriyaṁ śaucabratācārane vara sāvitriya naṁdanaṁ diṭadineṁdaṁdī dharācakradoḷe sthiralakṣmīnidhiyaiciseṭṭiyēṁ valaṁ dhanyaṁ pera¨rdhanyarē .
moraṭavaiciseṭṭeya¨rmmāḍisida śrimadabhinavaprasannakēśavadēva¨rgge . śakava¨rṣada 1101 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada phālgunada puṇnami śukravāra
grahaṇa saṁkrānti vyatipātadandu śrīmāḷeyagēriyanāyaka rudradēva pramukha vaśēśanū¨rvvaru tammakēriya sthānapūjeyaṁ nandādīvige naḍavantā
daya kēsavadēvayyaṁgaḷu mukhyavāgi binnageyadaśēśa mahānakharaṁgaḷu kammaṭadalu bhaṁgāravaṁ māṟanikidalli dēvaraṁgabhōgakke yācaṁdrā¨rkkaBetween this line and the above, some
naḍavaṁtāgi nūṟakke bīsamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ caitrārōpaṇakke va¨rṣaṁ prati bīsakke hāgavoṁdaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ caitrakke hāgavoṁdaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ bhaṇḍasāleya śrē
gaḷu yalu va¨rṣaṁprati caitrakke hāga mattaṁ paitrakke hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ gaṁdhavaṇadaṁgaḍiya nakharaṁgaḷu tammaṁgaḍiyalu va¨rṣaṁprati caitrakke
hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ bhattavaṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya nakharaṁgaḷu tammaṁgaḍiyalu va¨rṣaṁprati caitrakke hāga . mattaṁ paitrakke hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ nela
nakharaṁgaḷu tammaṁgaḍiyalu va¨rṣaṁprati caitrakke hāga . mattaṁ paitrakke hāgamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ taḷabhōgada kēṇikāraṁ ghaḷigeyara kēśavadēva tannakēṇiya
dayeleyalli dēvarige biṭṭa Ele 200 . Āvaṁ va¨rṣaṁ prati naḍeva kēṇikāṟaru pratipāḷisuvar . mattaṁ taḷāṟa malleyanāyakaṁ
keyalli dēvaraṁgabhōgakkācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ naḍevantāgi biṭṭa paṇa 5 maṁ va¨rṣaṁprati naḍava taḷāṟaru pratipāḷisuvaru . mattaṁ vubhayanānādēsigaḷu dē
kke yūroḷage hokka peḷiyalli biṭṭa paṇa 2 heṟavara peḷiyalli biṭṭa paṇa 2 mattaṁ kudurege vīsavoṁdaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ haṁcukada bhāyiseṭṭiya
yaṁ māṟakoṁḍallihoṁge kāyeraḍu biṭṭar . Adanārō¨rvvarū māṟa koṁḍavaru pratipāḷisuvaru . mattaṁ pēṁṭheya kēriyaynū¨rvva
dānakkaṁ goṁdu baḷḷa bhattamaṁ biṭṭar . mattaṁ śrīmāḷeyagēriya nāyaka rudradēvaṁ dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ naḍavantā
1 . mattaṁ harika rāyarasaru biṭṭa gadyā 2 . mattaṁ mūrutiyara E biṭṭagadyā 1 . mattaṁ yavara cikka bammadēva biṭṭa gadyā 1 mattakokkaya
dēva biṭṭagadyāṇa 1 . mattaṁ śrīmadaccina kēṇikāṟaṁ bhāgyō daya kēśavadēvayyaṁgaḷu caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ naḍavantāgi yuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiya
kēśavadēva biṭṭa paṇa 2 paga . © mattaṁ taḷabhōgada kēṇikāṟaṁ ghaḷigeyara kēśavadēva biṭṭa pa 2 pa .
© mattaṁ śrī saṁkaradēvarige karavaḍada kēṇikāṟaṁ cikka kēśavadēva biṭṭa paṇa 2 paga . mattaṁ taḷa
paṇa 2 paga . Intīdha¨rmmamaṁ va¨rṣaṁprati naḍava kēṇikāṟaru taṁtamma dha¨rmmavāgi pra
moraṭadaiciseṭṭiyaru śrī śaṁkaradēvarige yuttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti
rigaṁ biṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 . Intī [dha¨rmavaṁ va¨rṣaṁ] prati naḍeva Āṇikāṟaruṁ taṁ
damagedA few letters in this line Sōmēs11vara IV, No, 63 above.
Digital edition of SII 15.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
